title: Cache sload result in local variable before using in check and sstore
trigger_patterns: sload used in condition and arithmetic
description: Reading a storage slot once and caching in a YUL local variable avoids a second SLOAD (800 gas on Mantle) when the value is needed for both a conditional check and an arithmetic update.
when_to_apply: Any read-check-write pattern on the same storage slot
when_not_to_apply: When the value may change between read and write due to reentrancy (use checks-effects-interactions instead)
